projects.title: Amelia Island Built-in Bookshelves
projects.description: A floor-to-ceiling custom library corner built-in in dark oak featuring integrated warm LED lighting, heavy crown molding, and customized shelf sizing to fit the client's books perfectly.

phases.name: Phase 1: Framing
phases.description: Constructed the raw heavy structural wood framework anchored directly into the wall studs and drywall base.

phases.name: Phase 2: Assembly & Shelving
phases.description: Assembled the solid dark oak shelves, routing custom slots for wiring and lighting fixtures.

phases.name: Phase 3: Crown & Lighting
phases.description: Installed elegant top crown molding, soft-glow lighting under the shelves, and premium lacquer finish.

projects.title: Fernandina Custom Shelving & Cabinetry
projects.description: Stunning under-stairs built-in custom cabinets and shelving in rich walnut wood, showcasing hand-stained finishes, perfect door panel routing, and tight joinery.

projects.title: Yulee Farmhouse Mudroom Benches
projects.description: A highly durable farmhouse mudroom bench with coat hooks, shoe cubbies, and integrated storage baskets. Built with solid hard maple and dark walnut benches.
